description: Printed Haggada in Hebrew and Judaeo-Italian. There are lovely illuminations, captioned with lines of poetry. The format is identical to T-S Misc.15.69, except that that one appears to be in Ladino and this in Judaeo-Italian.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Italian. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
